reviews.summary:
PASS — independently verified the just-refreshed docs/protocol/threeway/ suite (6 files: README, ONBOARDING, UNIFIED-OPERATING-DOCTRINE, ARCHITECTURE-DIAGRAM, CODEX-ADOPTION, ANTIGRAVITY-ADOPTION) against HEAD a590294e. No defects found.

(1) ANCHORS — every file:line anchor in the suite resolves to its named symbol at HEAD (verified via sed against source). All task spot-checks confirmed: run_gate gate.py:158; cas_create_or_update_ref gitcas.py:185; preflight_bus_init gitcas.py:245; EventStore.append store.py:39; RefEventStore.append refstore.py:132; predicate by-seat authority predicate.py:136; ci_result clauses predicate.py:152-161; co_sign_satisfied tier.py:39 (docstring confirms fail-closed, does NOT return False for T2/T3 — matches doctrine); seats loop.py:43-52. Also verified every other anchor cited in the suite: predicate.py:39 (evaluate, spans 39-167 — final MERGEABLE return at 167, next def at 170, matches the "spanning 39-167" claim); predicate.py:84 (brief signer), :116 (cycle_go signer), :140 (release_order signer); store.py:39-50; keys.py:3-13 (custody docstring), keys.py:66 (default keystore), keys_bootstrap.py:16-29 (--seats plural, all-nine-in-one-pass); loop.py:104-105 (ci_result fixture line, docstring confirms UNSIGNED test/demo fixture for ONE pair — matches CODEX doc claim); scripts/codex_protocol_model.py:104 (COORDINATOR_SEATS both bind coordinator mode) + :154-156/:155-156 (CODEX_SEAT env, "compatibility aliases... unpinned"); scripts/protocol_mailbox.py:17 (RECEIVING_SEATS exact); scripts/status.py:141 (_MAILBOX_SEATS = protocol_mailbox.RECEIVING_SEATS).

(2) STALE CLAIMS — exhaustive case-insensitive sweep across all 6 files found ZERO surviving stale claims: no "deferred stub", no "Slice 3 unbuilt", no "co_sign_satisfied returns False", no "coordinator2 rejected/target-state-only", no "spec §8.8", no "gate.py:95", no dead PR#19/branch claims. The two near-matches are correct/non-stale: UNIFIED:122 affirms co_sign "does NOT return False for T2/T3" (the corrected claim), and the coordinator2 "target-state" language correctly scopes the LIVE integrator role as target-state while affirming coordinator2 is already an accepted mode-bound alias (matches source). Corroborating source state verified: DECISIONS.md highest ADR = ADR-049 (README's ADR-034..049 range accurate); ARCHITECTURE.md §13A exists at line 1699; coordination/threeway/keys/ holds only README.md (the "keys NOT provisioned / hard blocker" claim is accurate across all docs).

(3) LINKS — all 15 distinct relative markdown link targets resolve from the suite dir (AGENTS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, CLAUDE.md, DECISIONS.md, codex_protocol_model.py, threeway/, threeway/loop.py, the slice-2.5 plan, the topology spec, ../codex/continuation.md, and the 5 intra-suite docs) — verified via filesystem existence checks.

Suite files (absolute): /Users/hyungkoookkim/Content/docs/protocol/threeway/{README.md,ONBOARDING.md,UNIFIED-OPERATING-DOCTRINE.md,ARCHITECTURE-DIAGRAM.md,CODEX-ADOPTION.md,ANTIGRAVITY-ADOPTION.md}.

reviews.lens: unification-consistency (cross-doc agreement + agreement with truth-sources: threeway/loop.py:43-52, spec §8 item 8)
reviews.summary: All four required cross-doc consistency checks PASS, and the load-bearing facts are verified against the truth-sources. (1) Seat->provider table is identical across README, UNIFIED §I.2, CODEX §2, ANTIGRAVITY §1, ARCHITECTURE-DIAGRAM, and matches threeway/loop.py:43-52 exactly: Pair-A director=Codex / operator=Claude / coordinator=Claude; Pair-B director2=Claude / operator2=Codex / coordinator2=Codex; Codex's three Layer-1 seats = director, operator2, coordinator2 (README:10, UNIFIED:65-67). (2) Build-status statements agree everywhere: 'wired into nothing' (README:23-24, UNIFIED:108-110, CODEX:105, ONBOARDING:63, ARCHITECTURE-DIAGRAM:13 — verified: import threeway only under threeway/ and tests/); Slice 2.5 cutover BUILT-but-NOT-executed/ADR-045-gated (README:25-26, UNIFIED:115, CODEX:120, ANTIGRAVITY:136, ARCHITECTURE-DIAGRAM:14); Slice-3 tier BUILT+enforcing(ADR-035)/scope-b pending (README:27, UNIFIED:119-124, CODEX:132-136, ARCHITECTURE-DIAGRAM:96); keys NOT provisioned (README:29, UNIFIED:125-126, ARCHITECTURE-DIAGRAM:16 — verified: coordination/threeway/keys/ holds only README.md, no .pub). (3) coordinator2 status stated consistently as 'binds coordinator MODE now (compatibility alias, unpinned); live signed-bus integrator role is target-state' (ONBOARDING:84, CODEX:56/64-67/165-168, UNIFIED:373) — code cites at scripts/codex_protocol_model.py:104,154-156 verified faithful. (4) No-dual-write citation form matches: 'spec §8 item 8' in UNIFIED:143 and ANTIGRAVITY:138 (and CODEX:106); UNIFIED's '(spec §8 item 8, line 400)' anchor verified against the spec — line 400 reads 'No dual-write authority at any point.' No residual cross-doc contradictions found.

All references agree; none contradict. Verified true: ls coordination/threeway/keys/ -> only README.md, no .pub files.
